calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing (Notices)
Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:53 am and concluding at 10:01 am.

Plaintiff Capital One, N.A. is represented by Gloria Zarco, Esq.
Defendant Carol Seibert not appearing.
BARBRA KURKOWSKI is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

The Court confirms with counsel that the Judgment will resolve the matter.

COURT FINDS:
The Complaint filed on October 17, 2023 is the operative pleading.
The requested Judgment is supported by the Testimony and Evidence presented.
The Requested Damages are supported by the evidence.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Capital One, N.A., and against Defendant Carol Seibert, as follows:

1. Damages: $33,483.27
2. Costs: $630.30

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $34,113.57

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
